notes: The M248 content-mgr-link lane of v2.7 'july jitter'. Re-pointed the content-stories MANAGER CTA from the org activity-dashboard scoreboard to the per-session /sim manager RESULT view (isManagerView, persisted read via JobSimulationResult(sessionId) — no recompute). The one genuine unknown (does the interview manager report live on /sim?) was discharged as a rung-0 verify-interview read that a LIVE demo-2 render OVERTURNED (D1 static -> D3 live): the /sim interview manager surface is flag/data-gated and renders 'Coming Soon' on a demo, so INTERVIEW keeps its dedicated /enterprise/activity-dashboard/interviews route while the NON-interview family (21 of 23 manager pairs) moves to /sim. The manager grader keys on the SCORE (language-agnostic + collapse-proof) after the same live pass showed Italian renders + collapsed Evaluated-Skills. Tooling + docs only, 0 platform-repo edits.
